description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Template that accepts board, max_size, and optional max_size_apa102 inputs. Run a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out code, sets up Python 3.11, installs UV, and performs a series of compile, check size, and inspect steps for Blink and Apa102 examples. The workflow also generates a timestamp and random hex, uploads the build log as an artifact, and fails if any step fails.
